title: [spec-compliance] outdated cross-reference to ygg_addr_from_pubkey after refactor
description: spec/06-security.md:105-145 (sections 8.5, 8.7) references `rust/lichen-link/src/identity.rs:14-48` (`yggdrasil_addr_from_pubkey`) and specific line 40. This no longer matches after commit ce284558b (project-LICHEN-ebhw.2.1.2) which moved the function to lichen-core/src/addr.rs as ygg_addr_from_pubkey (with SHA-512+SHA-256 impl matching the normative steps and test/vectors/yggdrasil-derivation.json). The re-export in lichen-link/lib.rs exists but spec is stale. Code now differs from spec documentation. Also verify all other cross-references in 03-addressing.md, 04-network.md. Test vectors still pass.
